sections.title: Manifesto
sections.statement:
Presentation is persuasion
Not decoration
Not slides
Clarity builds trust
Story creates conviction
I help you own the room

sections.title: Philosophy
sections.statement:
Behind every great presentation
is a great presenter
Strategy first
Story second
Slides serve the speaker
Not the other way around

sections.title: Approach
sections.statement:
I work with you
Not for you
Shape the narrative together
Prepare for the hard questions
Until confidence becomes natural

sections.title: Credibility
sections.statement:
I speak the language of boardrooms
and investor meetings
Business strategy meets visual clarity
Trusted with high-stakes moments
Built for the conversations that matter

sections.title: Principles
sections.statement:
Your voice, amplified
Your story, clarified
Your confidence, earned
I stay behind the curtain
You take the spotlight
